questions.sentence: Infrastructure as Code IaC is the practice of managing and provisioning your applications infrastructure through machinereadable definition files rather than manual hardware configuration
For a front end architect IaC allows you to define your hosting environment CDNs and API gateways in a declarative way
Popular tools like Terraform or AWS CloudFormation are used to write these scripts
The main benefit of IaC is consistency you can recreate the exact same environment in multiple regions or for different stages staging production with minimal effort
Furthermore because the infrastructure is defined as code it can be versioncontrolled in the same way as your applications source code
